false
ew
Agent routing: NEVER general-purpose when a project agent fits. UI verification → wispr-eyes, build → build-compile, UI → macos-platform/feature-scaffolding, audio → audio-pipeline.

brain-check-v2 Brain system has 3 verification mechanisms: (1) auto-generated sections in canonical docs (architecture.md protocol_conformers, whisperkit-research.md whisperkit_defaults) via brain-refresh.sh inject_auto_section(), (2) BRAIN ID annotations (// BRAIN: gotcha id=X in source ↔ <!-- BRAIN: id=X --> in docs, verified by brain-check.sh), (3) agent/skill file integrity checks. brain-check.sh exit 1 = BROKEN/STALE (auto-fixable), exit 0 = PASS or WARNINGs only. brain-prime.sh surfaces warnings at session start.

brain-file-compression-rules Prefer one-line MUST rules over explanatory paragraphs when the pattern is well understood. Keep code examples only for high-confusion or high-regression patterns. Never store the same lesson in both narrative and example form unless the example adds real defensive value. Remove tutorial prose, preserve the invariant, keep enough specificity to prevent regressions.
buddies-gpt54pro-cost-gate gpt-5.4-pro is brutally expensive. NEVER use it unless user explicitly requests it. Default Council workflow uses gpt-5.4 for all roles. gpt-5.4-pro is opt-in only.
Buddies hygiene: Proactively offer to delete finished sessions. Clean stale ones at session start.

Council pattern: ALWAYS fire GPT and Gemini buddies calls as parallel tool calls, never sequential. User can Ctrl+B to background slow responses. Do NOT use subagents for buddies by default — only when user explicitly requests it. Parallel tool calls are sufficient for concurrency.

buddies-rulebook Buddies MCP usage rules: PROVIDERS: OpenAI (default for Council), Gemini (available, thinking-model aware). MODELS: gpt-5-mini (cheap triage, routine), gpt-5.4 (main workhorse, all Council roles), gpt-5.4-pro (NEVER use unless user explicitly requests — very expensive), gpt-4o (vision only), gemini-2.5-pro (default Gemini). EFFORT: gpt-5-mini/5.4 support low/medium/high. gpt-5.4-pro supports medium/high/xhigh only (low auto-clamped to high). SAFETY: Config refreshes every call (model/effort changes mid-session OK). Token floor auto-enforced (8192 OpenAI, 8192 Gemini). Gemini thinking tokens handled — auto-retry on empty response. Incomplete OpenAI responses auto-retry with effort downgrade + 2x budget. HYGIENE: Delete sessions when done. Clean stale sessions at session start. Name sessions descriptively (e.g. 'whisperkit-tuning-research' not 'test-1').
Context conservation: NEVER debug yourself — spin up an agent. Main context = coordination only.

EnviousType integration: Plan at .claude/plans/imperative-purring-emerson.md. Prototype at EnviousWispr/EnviousType/ (separate git repo, gitignored). Core idea: bundle text-polish-in-place feature into EnviousWispr as TYPE sidebar group alongside VOICE. 3 new files + 6 modified. Port only AXTextService; reuse all existing LLM infra. Competitive research session in buddies: envioustype-competitive-research.
Frontend designer: Sonnet model, incremental iteration. Opus only for complex visual systems.

Gemini image gen API: Use generateContent endpoint, NOT predict. Model IDs: gemini-3-pro-image-preview (Nano Banana Pro, best quality, 4K), gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview (Nano Banana 2, fast), gemini-2.5-flash-image (original). Endpoint: POST https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/{MODEL}:generateContent. Auth: -H 'x-goog-api-key: KEY'. MUST include responseModalities in generationConfig. Aspect ratios: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9, 3:4, 4:3, etc. Sizes: 1K, 2K, 4K. Response: candidates[0].content.parts[N].inlineData.data (base64 PNG). Key at ~/.enviouswispr-keys/gemini-api-key.

Manhwa art regen workflow: User generates art in Gemini chat (Nano Banana Pro), downloads PNG, drops in ~/Downloads. We cp to docs/the-two-of-us-v2/public/scenes/. Prompts must bake in ALL text overlays (speech bubbles, captions, labels) so HTML overlays can be removed. Simplify scene code to: sceneInner > artContainer(relative, max-width:700px) > flow img + optional captionWrap(absolute). Consistent protagonist: young man, dark messy hair, dark jacket/hoodie.

Manhwa bg image opacity: User wants full opacity (1.0) on AI art — no 0.55 dimming. Art should be vibrant. Text readability comes from bubble backgrounds, text-shadow, and scrims — not by dimming the art.

Manhwa caption positioning: Captions inside flex wrappers fall below the bg image's mask-fade zone. Fix: move Caption outside the wrapper div, wrap in an absolutely-positioned div (bottom: 2rem, left/right: 0, z-index: 2). Scene component already has position:relative. Also extend mask-image to black 95% (not 90%) so bottom content isn't faded.

Manhwa portrait art layout: Portrait images (1024x1792) should NOT use position:absolute + object-fit:cover — it crops heavily. Instead: make image a normal flow element (display:block, width:100%, height:auto) inside a relative artContainer with max-width (e.g. 700px). Overlay text with position:absolute inset:0 div. This shows the full image at natural aspect ratio with dark background on sides.
Manhwa/scroll-story CSS: NEVER put overflow-x:hidden on html+body — it can block trackpad scroll on macOS. Put it only on #root or a wrapper div.
Manhwa/scroll-story CSS: NEVER use scroll-behavior:smooth with framer-motion useScroll — it blocks scrolling entirely.
Manhwa/scroll-story CSS: overflow:hidden on scene sections swallows initial trackpad scroll events. Remove it unless absolutely needed for clipping.
Manhwa/scroll-story CSS: overscroll-behavior:none on html/body blocks trackpad scrolling on macOS. Avoid it or apply only to inner containers.

Manhwa/scroll-story: framer-motion useScroll+useTransform parallax intercepts small trackpad deltas — slow scroll feels stuck while fast scroll works. Use plain CSS or remove parallax for scroll stories.

Manhwa/scroll-story: parallaxIntensity values are multiplied by -50 in transform. Values like 12 or 15 (instead of 0.12 or 0.15) cause content to fly 600-750px off-screen. Always use decimal values 0.05-0.15.

Manhwa/scroll-story text: All text over AI art needs multi-layer text-shadow for readability: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.9), 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,1)'. Font-weight minimum 500 for body, 700+ for headlines. No muted colors — use full white (#f8f5ff).

Manhwa/scroll-story text: NEVER use opacity animations on text in scroll stories — text must always be fully visible. Opacity fade-in makes text look transparent/unreadable as user scrolls. Keep opacity animations only on background images.
Manhwa/scroll-story text: text-shadow doesn't work on background-clip:text elements (like RainbowText gradient). Use filter: drop-shadow() instead.

Manhwa/scroll-story: z-index pseudo-element overlays (::before/::after for edge blending) at z-index above content will fade text as user scrolls. If AI images already have CSS mask-image for edge blending, pseudo-elements are redundant — remove them.

max-recording-duration Both pipelines have graceful 5-min auto-stop in VAD monitor loop (TimingConstants.maxRecordingDuration = 300s). Calls stopAndTranscribe() for full transcription+paste. AudioCaptureManager still has hard 10-min emergency limit (600s, sample-count based) as fallback.
Multi-session safety: One session per branch. Plans in docs/plans/, never /tmp/.
ops-gemini-key-source Gemini API key sourced from Google Cloud Console (console.cloud.google.com), not AI Studio.
Ops — Gmail: saurabhav@gmail.com | GitHub: saurabhav88, repo saurabhav88/EnviousWispr, ~/bin/gh | CI: No required status checks, GITHUB_TOKEN for everything, no PATs.
ops-mcp-keys API keys at ~/.enviouswispr-keys/ (gemini-api-key, openai-api-key). Both active.
Ops — Sparkle sign_update: .build/artifacts/sparkle/Sparkle/bin/sign_update — use -p for raw signature. SUPublicEDKey: jHq1RIQKDmtO64qtCdZ6jNdHNFrfyScE16yuu+ufvDw=

overlay-panel-transitions RecordingOverlayPanel supports bidirectional transitions: transitionToPolishing() (recording→polishing) and transitionToRecording() (polishing→recording). Both tear down the existing NSPanel, preserve Y position, and recreate via deferred DispatchWorkItem. The show(audioLevelProvider:) method routes to transitionToRecording() when a panel already exists instead of returning early.

Paste system: Tiered cascade validated. Tier 1=AX kAXSelectedTextAttribute (zero disruption), Tier 2=activate+CGEvent .cgAnnotatedSessionEventTap, Tier 2b=AppleScript Edit>Paste, Tier 3=clipboard+notify. All AX on MainActor. Set AXTimeout(1s). Log (bundle_id, tier, ms). Sources: Hex, speak2, Gemini, OpenAI. Issue ew-zwn.

Proactive constraint surfacing: During planning/design phase, flag technical gotchas like 'this mockup requires replacing native SwiftUI Form with custom views' BEFORE implementation. User wants expectation-setting early — answer questions upfront, don't let them discover gaps after the fact.

ptt-task-serialization PTT/hotkey spam resilience: fire-and-forget Tasks from hotkey events cause zombie Task pileup. Fix: HotkeyService.recordingTask tracks the single in-flight Task, each new press/release cancels the previous. Task.isCancelled checks at suspension points (preWarm, model load, format stabilization) in TranscriptionPipeline and AppState let zombies bail out. preWarmAudioInput() clears stale stopRequested before await. isStarting guards concurrent startRecording. Never put stopRequested clearing at top of startRecording — it wipes fresh flags from PTT release during prewarm.

RainbowText shadow fix: text-shadow bleeds into background-clip:text elements, darkening the gradient fill. Use filter: drop-shadow on the PARENT element instead — it renders behind without affecting the gradient. Applied in Scene08Reveal.

superwhisper-model-comparison SuperWhisper uses whisper.cpp. Key models: Ultra V3 Turbo (large-v3-turbo) 8/8 Speed/Accuracy — BEST BALANCE, now our default. Ultra (large-v3) 6/10, Pro (medium) 7/8, Standard (small) 8/5. We confirmed large-v3-turbo available in WhisperKit 0.15.0 via string API. Multilingual (DE/TA supported).

swiftui-plain-button-hit-testing .buttonStyle(.plain) makes only visible content tappable — transparent areas ignored. .background() is visual only, does NOT extend hit area. MUST add .contentShape(Rectangle()) before .background() on any plain button with expanded layout (padding, frame). Applies to BrandedSegmentedPicker, PresetCard, writingStyleCard, and any future card-style buttons.
UAT after every fix: fix → rebuild & relaunch → wispr-eyes → only THEN done. SKIPPED valid for non-UI changes.

uat-ptt-key-simulation CGEvent flagsChanged simulation works for PTT UAT testing. Compile /tmp/ptt_test.swift (uses CGEvent with .flagsChanged type, keyCode 58 for left Option). Events reach NSEvent.addGlobalMonitorForEvents. Tests: quick_tap (50ms), spam (8x rapid), hold (2s). App logs at ~/Library/Logs/EnviousWispr/app.log (AppLogger writes to file when debug mode enabled). System log (log show) does NOT capture app logs — always use the log file directly.

WhisperKit Full Treatment build order: Step 1 ew-fwg DONE, Step 2 ew-bv1 (optimize decode defaults) + ew-ld8 (Neural Engine compute) READY NOW, Step 3 ew-dvm (streaming) blocked by step 2, Step 4 ew-k4i (segment filtering) blocked by step 3. Epic: ew-b93. Research: .claude/knowledge/whisperkit-research.md. Buddies session: whisperkit-tuning-research. Key decisions: large-v3 only, EN+DE+TA languages, tune first then speed up, post-ASR cleanup stays shared.

WhisperKit highway: DictationPipeline protocol + OverlayIntent enum go in Sources/EnviousWispr/Pipeline/DictationPipeline.swift. Protocol has handle(event: PipelineEvent) single entry point. OverlayIntent: .hidden, .recording(audioLevel:), .processing(label:). PipelineEvent: .preWarm, .toggleRecording, .requestStop, .cancelRecording, .reset

whisperkit-highway-plan-final WhisperKit Highway plan FINAL v2 at docs/plans/whisperkit-highway/. 5 phases (0-4). DictationPipeline protocol + OverlayIntent. 8-state WhisperKitPipelineState. Event-driven handle(event:). Shared AudioCaptureManager. Merge at runTextProcessing(asrText:language:). Default model: large-v3-turbo (confirmed in WK 0.15.0). Languages: EN/DE/TA manual select. 5 new skills: wispr-scaffold-whisperkit-capture, wispr-scaffold-independent-pipeline, wispr-configure-whisperkit-vad, wispr-configure-whisperkit-streaming, wispr-test-dual-pipeline. 3 agent files updated (audio-pipeline, feature-scaffolding, testing). LLMPolishStep language bug tracked as ew-9bd.

whisperkit-highway-shipped WhisperKit highway fully shipped and epic ew-b93 closed. All phases complete: modularity refactor (ew-fwg), decode tuning (ew-bv1), Neural Engine (ew-ld8), incremental worker, overlay fix (ew-gd1), model unload (ew-6bs), 5-min max duration (ew-cya). Environment VAD already wired (ew-cg3 closed as done). Only remaining gap: ew-ptb (on-demand re-polish routing, P3 deferred).

whisperkit-large-v3-turbo-confirmed large-v3-turbo confirmed available in WhisperKit 0.15.0 via string-based API (no ModelVariant enum case). WhisperKit.download(variant: "large-v3-turbo") works. Supported on all M-series Macs. Multilingual (DE/TA). Now the default model for WhisperKit highway. Replaces large-v3 in 3 hardcoded defaults: SettingsManager, WhisperKitSetupService, WhisperKitBackend.

whisperkit-model-name-format WhisperKit.download(variant:) uses glob *variant/* against HF repo. Model names use underscores not hyphens: openai_whisper-large-v3_turbo (not large-v3-turbo). Always use the full HF folder name for downloads. The short names only work for already-downloaded models.

WhisperKit modularity refactor (ew-fwg): Created WhisperKitDecodingConfig struct in WhisperKitBackend.swift. Stripped 6 WK fields from TranscriptionOptions (now just language + enableTimestamps). Added updateDecodingConfig on WhisperKitBackend actor, updateWhisperKitDecodingConfig on ASRManager. Split AppState sync into syncTranscriptionOptions (shared) + syncWhisperKitDecodingConfig (WK-only). Also fixed model cache path bug (ew-v7h) — models at ~/Documents/huggingface/ not ~/Library/Caches/.

WhisperKit pipeline split: monolithic TranscriptionPipeline doesn't fit both streaming (Parakeet) and batch (WhisperKit) backends. Decision: split into ParakeetPipeline + WhisperKitPipeline behind DictationPipeline protocol. Keep shared: AudioCaptureManager, HotkeyService, LLM polish, PasteService. Epic: ew-u2d. Plans: docs/whisperkit-architecture-decision.md, docs/whisperkit-ux-parity-plan.md. Buddies: whisperkit-architecture-debate. Current state: Checkpoint 2 — WK transcribes but UX rough (timer continues during batch ASR, no distinct overlay states). Parakeet perfect.

WhisperKit session 2026-03-06 timeline: (1) Discovered WK model not downloading, fixed WhisperKitSetupService. (2) Tuned DecodingOptions — hardcoded optimized defaults (ew-bv1), Neural Engine routing (ew-ld8), removed UI sliders. COMMITTED+PUSHED. (3) Hit overlay/state machine bugs: .transcribing overloaded for model-load AND ASR, stopRequested race causing 'recording too short 0.00s', overlay not transitioning loading→recording. (4) Patched with .loadingModel state, startRequestCancelled flag — each patch revealed more edge cases. (5) Consulted GPT+Gemini: unanimous — split pipelines, don't patch. (6) REVERTED all overlay patches, keeping decode optimizations. Clean at Checkpoint 2.

WhisperKit vs Parakeet: Keep both as modular, independent backends. Parakeet = primary English (streaming, zero-setup, fast). WhisperKit = premium multi-language + accuracy option. Recording Environment + Cleanup are Parakeet features. WhisperKit features are separate workstream. If we rip WhisperKit out, nothing should break. Research saved to .claude/knowledge/whisperkit-research.md.
